headline: 3 Reasons to Sell NSC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Norfolk Southern has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 7.5%. The stock now trades at $311.61, marking a 13.1% gain. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
